nasb.text: Now I praise you because you remember me in everything and hold firmly to the traditions, just as I delivered them to you.

esv.text: Now I commend you because you remember me in everything and maintain the traditions even as I delivered them to you.

cnv.text: 我稱讚你們，因為你們在一切事上都記念我，又持守我傳交給你們的教訓。

ccb.text: 我赞赏你们，因为你们凡事都想到我，并坚守我传给你们的各种教导。

csbs.text: 我称赞你们，因为你们在一切事上都记念我，并且照着我所传给你们的来持守传统。
